case_title: ARZHINTAR, LUBA VS ZHAO, PEILI et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERCURY FRENCH CLEANERS AND LAUNDRY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY ARZHINTAR, LUBA AS TO DEFENDANT ZHAO, PEILI MERCURY FRENCH CLEANERS AND LAUNDRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
